embed.title: {{changeTypeText}} {{fortTypeText}} {{name}}
⚠️ Weather change ⚠️
Welcome
embed.description:
Thank you for registering 
 To start, please set a location by replying to this bot with `{{prefix}}location name of place` 
 That will set a center point for your scanning circle for most of the other commands.

fields.name: **General commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help`: Shows this message 
`{{prefix}}poracle`: Adds you to database and enables tracking 
`{{prefix}}unregister`: Removes you from tracking 
`{{prefix}}stop`: Temporarily stops alarms 
`{{prefix}}start`: Re-enables alarms 
`{{prefix}}tracked`: Shows you what you are currently configured to be notified about. 
 You can add the variable `clean` to most of the tracking commands, to make the bot delete the entry after it has expired. 
 See more options for each command explained at [the full manual](https://muckelba.github.io/poracleWiki/userguide/)

fields.name: **_Basic Examples_**
fields.value:
You probably want to start off with something like these commands. One command at a time. Change the distances (d=metres) to suit yourself. 
`{{prefix}}location 123 Common Road, Town, Region` 
`{{prefix}}track unown azelf mesprit uxie d5000 ` 
`{{prefix}}track archen axew gible gabite cranidos deino zweilous litwick lampent riolu darumaka d1500` 
`{{prefix}}raid timburr litwick d1500` 
`{{prefix}}track everything iv100 d1000` 
`{{prefix}}quest silver_pinap_berry d500 clean`

fields.name: **Monster tracking commands**
fields.value:
The command needs to include at least one monster and any amount of variables. E.g. 
`{{prefix}}track snorlax lapras d500 iv50-90 cp1000 level15`: This command would alert you about Snorlax and Lapras within 500 meters of your location, with an IV between 50% - 90%, of at least level 15, and a minimum CP of 1000. 
`{{prefix}}track everything great1-3 greatcp1450 clean`: This alert you about all pvp mons and evolutions in your area, with an rank between 1-3, a minimum final CP of 1450 and clean message after despawn. 
`{{prefix}}untrack lapras vileplume`: will remove tracking for lapras and vileplume

fields.name: **Raid tracking commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}raid snorlax lapras d500 instinct`: Any variables are optional. This command would alert you about snorlax and lapras raids within 500 meters of your location (or inside an added area), if the Gym is controlled by team Instinct. 
`{{prefix}}raid remove klink vileplume`: Remove tracking for klink and vileplume raids

fields.name: **Raid egg tracking commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}egg level3 d500 instinct`: Any variables are optional, this command would alert you about level 3 raid eggs within 500 meters of your location or inside an added area. The set filters require the Gym to be controlled by team Instinct 
`{{prefix}}egg remove level3`: Remove tracking for level 3 raid eggs

fields.name: **Quest tracking commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest porygon pikachu rare_candy silver_pinap_berry d500 clean`: Any variables are optional, this command would alert you about Quests obtainable within 500m of your location with porygon, pikachu, rare candy, or silver pinaps as rewards 
`{{prefix}}quest remove all_items`: Removes tracking for all item based quests. Can also use `all_pokemon` or `stardust`

fields.name: **Invasion tracking commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}invasion d500 dragon mixed`: Any variables are optional, this command would alert you about Team Rocket Incidents within 500m of your location if the grunt type was mixed or dragon. You can use any pokemon type name.
`{{prefix}}invasion remove dragon`: Removes tracking for specified Team Rocket Incidents.

fields.name: **Gym tracking commands**
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}gym instinct slot_changes`: Any arguments are optional, this command would alert you about gyms inside an added area. The set filters require the Gym to be controlled by team Instinct and slot changes occur
`{{prefix}}gym remove instinct`: Removes tracking for all gyms controlled by team Instinct.

fields.name: **Areas**
fields.value:
If your admin has configured areas, these other commands are available: 
`{{prefix}}area list`: Lists the possible areas you can add. 
`{{prefix}}location yourArea`: Sets yourArea as your location 
 Admin commands: 
`{{prefix}}area add somePlace`: Sets one or multiple areas where to receive alarms from (areas need to be configured by admin) 
`{{prefix}}area remove somePlace`: Removes a configured area

fields.name: **Further info**
fields.value: See all details about the commands in [the full manual](https://muckelba.github.io/poracleWiki/userguide/)

fields.name: **How far can I walk in metres/minutes? According to the web...**

embed.title: Welcome
embed.description:
Thank you for registering 
Please set a location `{{prefix}}location name of place` or add ares where to receive alarms from

fields.name: ***General commands***
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help`: Shows this message 
`{{prefix}}poracle`: Adds you to database and enables tracking 
`{{prefix}}unregister`: Removes you from tracking 
`{{prefix}}stop`: Temporarily stops alarms 
`{{prefix}}start`: Re-enables alarms 
`{{prefix}}location yourArea`: Searches for yourArea and sets it as your location 
`{{prefix}}area add somePlace`: Sets one or multiple areas where to receive alarms from, areas need to be configured by admin 
`{{prefix}}area remove somePlace`: Removes a configured area 
`{{prefix}}tracked`: Shows you what you are currently configured to be notified about. 
 You can add the variable `clean` to most of the tracking commands, to make the bot delete the entry after it has expired. 
 See more options for each command explained at [the full manual](https://muckelba.github.io/poracleWiki/userguide/)

`{{prefix}}quest remove all_items`: Removes tracking for all item based quests. Can also use `all_pokemon` or `stardust`

embed.title: Quest Digest

fields.name: Setup
fields.value: Use `{{prefix}}profile` to set your saved **location**, choose **areas**, and configure **quiet hours**. Most slash alerts work best once your profile is set.

fields.name: Add Alerts
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}pokemon` Pokemon spawns
`{{prefix}}raid boss|level|egg`
`{{prefix}}maxbattle boss|level`
`{{prefix}}quest pokemon|item|stardust|candy|mega-energy`
`{{prefix}}rocket` Team Rocket invasions
`{{prefix}}pokestop-event` Pokestop events
`{{prefix}}gym`, `{{prefix}}fort`, `{{prefix}}nest`, `{{prefix}}weather`, `{{prefix}}lure`

Slash tip: on the major tracking commands, leaving the first option blank opens a guided flow.

fields.name: Manage Alerts
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}filters show` reviews your filters
`{{prefix}}filters show profile:<profile>` views one profile
`{{prefix}}filters show profile:all` shows a cross-profile summary
`{{prefix}}filters remove` removes one or more filters
`{{prefix}}start` and `{{prefix}}stop` enable or pause alerts

fields.name: Advanced
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}language` changes your language
`{{prefix}}info` looks up Pokemon, moves, items, weather, rarity, shiny lists, and translation help
`{{prefix}}help command:<name>` shows focused help for a specific command

fields.name: Quick Start
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}pokemon pokemon:<name>` tracks one Pokemon.
`{{prefix}}pokemon pokemon:everything` tracks everything.
When using slash commands, leaving `pokemon` blank opens a guided flow.

fields.name: Useful Filters
fields.value:
IV: `min_iv`, `max_iv`
Stats: `min_atk`, `min_def`, `min_sta`
Level/CP: `min_level`, `max_level`, `min_cp`, `max_cp`
Other: `gender`, `size`, `distance`, `form`, `clean`, `template`

fields.name: Next Step
fields.value: After adding a filter, use `{{prefix}}filters show` to confirm which profile it was saved to.

fields.name: Boss Or Level
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}raid boss pokemon:<boss>` tracks a raid boss.
`{{prefix}}raid level level:<level>` tracks a raid level.
`{{prefix}}raid egg level:<level>` tracks raid eggs.
When using slash commands, leaving the main target blank opens a guided flow.

fields.name: Optional Filters
fields.value:
`gym` narrows to one gym
`team` filters by gym ownership
`rsvp` filters RSVP state
`distance`, `clean`, and `template` work here too

fields.name: Related
fields.value: Use `{{prefix}}maxbattle boss|level` for max battle alerts.

fields.name: Rewards
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest pokemon pokemon:<pokemon>` tracks Pokemon rewards.
`{{prefix}}quest item item:<item>` tracks item rewards.
`{{prefix}}quest stardust min_amount:<amount>` tracks stardust rewards.
`{{prefix}}quest candy pokemon:<pokemon>` and `{{prefix}}quest mega-energy pokemon:<pokemon>` track the newer reward types.

fields.name: Filters
fields.value:
`min_amount` applies to item, stardust, candy, and mega-energy rewards.
`ar` filters AR vs non-AR quests.
`distance`, `clean`, and `template` are also supported.

fields.name: Setup Reminder
fields.value: Quest tracking depends on your saved location and selected areas being set correctly in `{{prefix}}profile`.

fields.name: Types
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}rocket type:<leader>` tracks leaders.
`{{prefix}}rocket type:<grunt>` tracks grunt lineups.
`{{prefix}}pokestop-event type:<event>` tracks Pokestop events.

fields.name: Filters
fields.value:
`distance`, `clean`, and `template` are supported.
Autocomplete helps with the known grunt and leader names.

fields.name: Review
fields.value: Use `{{prefix}}filters show` after adding a Rocket or Pokestop event filter to confirm the saved profile.

fields.name: Default View
fields.value: `{{prefix}}filters show` shows the detailed list for your current effective profile.

fields.name: Profile Scope
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}filters show profile:<profile>` shows one specific profile.
`{{prefix}}filters show profile:all` shows a summary across every profile without dumping the full list.

fields.name: Large Lists
fields.value: If one profile has a very large tracking list, Poracle sends it as a text file instead of truncating the details.

fields.name: Basic Use
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}filters remove type:<kind> tracking:<entry>` removes one filter.
Autocomplete is based on the selected filter type.

fields.name: Profile Scope
fields.value:
By default, slash removal works inside your current effective profile.
Use `profile:<profile>` to target one profile, or `profile:all` to search across every profile.

fields.name: Tip
fields.value: If you are unsure where something was saved, run `{{prefix}}filters show profile:all` first.

fields.name: What It Controls
fields.value: `{{prefix}}profile` manages your saved location, selected areas, active profile, and quiet-hour scheduler.

fields.name: Why It Matters
fields.value: Most slash filters save into your current effective profile and rely on your saved location or chosen areas.

fields.name: Recommended Setup
fields.value:
1. Set location
2. Pick areas
3. Review profile names
4. Add a scheduler only if you actually use quiet hours

fields.name: Lookups
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}info type:pokemon pokemon:<name>`
`{{prefix}}info type:moves`
`{{prefix}}info type:items`
`{{prefix}}info type:weather`
`{{prefix}}info type:rarity`
`{{prefix}}info type:shiny`
`{{prefix}}info type:translate`

fields.name: Guided Flow
fields.value: When using slash commands, leaving `type` blank opens a chooser. If you pick Pokemon, Poracle then prompts for the Pokemon name.

fields.name: Weather Info
fields.value: Weather info can use your saved location or coordinates that you enter directly in the slash flow.
